## 📋 DETAILED FAILURE ANALYSIS

### Error Pattern Distribution
```
ConfigurationError: 40% of failures
DependencyMissing: 30% of failures  
InvalidSyntax: 20% of failures
TokenLimitExceeded: 20% of failures
TimeoutError: 20% of failures
UnresolvedReference: 10% of failures
```

- **Commands over complexity limit (5.0):** 5/5 (100%)
- **Commands at maximum complexity (10.0):** 2/5 (40%)
